# zstack_v2v_conversion_host (Resource)

This resource allows you to manage V2V conversion hosts in ZStack.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_uuid` (String) The host UUID associated with this V2V conversion host.
- `name` (String) The name of the V2V conversion host.
- `storage_path` (String) The storage path of the V2V conversion host.
- `type` (String) The type of the V2V conversion host.

### Optional

- `description` (String) A description for the V2V conversion host.

### Read-Only

- `available_size` (Number) The available size in bytes.
- `host_state` (String) The host state.
- `host_status` (String) The host status.
- `state` (String) The state of the V2V conversion host.
- `total_size` (Number) The total size in bytes.
- `uuid` (String) The UUID of the V2V conversion host.
